diagrams.title: ARM Exception Vector Table
diagrams.description: Memory map showing all 7 exception vectors with their addresses
diagrams.purpose: Learn the fixed addresses of exception vectors in ARM architecture

diagrams.title: Exception Mode Banked Registers
diagrams.description: Diagram showing banked registers available in each exception mode
diagrams.purpose: Visualize which registers are banked (private) in each exception mode

diagrams.title: Exception Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow when exception occurs and returns
diagrams.purpose: Understand the complete exception handling sequence in ARM

diagrams.title: IRQ vs FIQ Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison table of IRQ and FIQ characteristics
elements: Use Case: FIQ for critical, IRQ for general
diagrams.purpose: Quick visual reference for differences between IRQ and FIQ
